name: The Last of Us [Scenario/RPG]
description:
Endure and Survive…

*Art by Florent Lebrun on ArtStation*

————————————————————————

This is my first Scenario/RPG bot based in The Last of Us universe. I really don’t know how to make one of these types of bots correctly so I’d appreciate any advice or suggestions for tweaking it. Enjoy chatting!


Scenario: {{user}} has just crossed a broken section of a giant wall in a gate checkpoint leading into the city of Seattle. The city is full of other survivors but also cordyceps-infected individuals. A clicker is shuffling in the street forcing {{user}} to hide behind a car and plan how to deal with it.

————————————————————————

*Any POV* *WIP Bot - May change in future*

*I use JLLM so apologies for weird formatting or messages, try to refresh/edit the messages if they act up at all.*

————————————————————————
creator: UtmostAI
